textByHashes.b65badce7e617c9f74e9433e0bd19d1f6c92a811: Human agreed to sacrifice himself to mighty Zulrah! We all most grateful.
textByHashes.8abd449445f7be534325fd7302d52ae193185688: Human agreed to sacrifice herself to mighty Zulrah! We all most grateful.
textByHashes.26ee52a8deb48565e82065a8c74c8de9bd3ef2b7: Puny human show respect to Zulrah or I smash you head.
textByHashes.f35c10386c9e4adf8a8df9609b00bcc1a7869ccc: Zulrah the great god. He mighty. You go see High Priestess, she tell you lots and lots.
textByHashes.18e148a69a83c32f5c54909701f9ea3963cea5a1: You leave that alone, human. You not one of us.
